title: derris yappii
intro: Derris yappii, also known as the Derris yappii plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant's roots have been traditionally used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, including the presence of rotenone, a natural insecticide and anti-inflammatory compound. The Derris yappii plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, treating snake bites, and alleviating rheumatism and other joint-related disorders. Derris yappii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as a powder, decoction, or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
